\begin{figure}[h!]

    \includegraphics[width=0.5\textwidth]{../input_files/plots/step_2_comparison_plot_1_1775305459.png}
    \caption{Comparison of the Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) for the Dual Kalman Filter (DKF) and the numerical derivative method as a function of Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR). The plot illustrates the superior robustness of the DKF in noisy conditions. While the numerical derivative method's error exceeds the 5\% observability threshold for SNR levels below 20 dB, the DKF maintains estimation accuracy for the spring constant ($k$) down to approximately 10 dB, demonstrating its effectiveness for parameter recovery in low-SNR regimes.}
    \label{fig:image0}
\end{figure}
